extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož attacked on the final steep climb in Trevi, holding off a closing YATES Adam by 3 seconds despite late pursuit.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ attacked solo on final steep climb with sufficient gap that YATES Adam's late counter fell 3 seconds short.
THOMAS Geraint took race lead via countback tie-breaker with VAN AVERMAET Greg, both finishing same time as BENOOT.
MAJKA Rafał crashed 30km from finish, losing all GC contention on critical mountain stage before final climb.
MOSCON Gianni marked VAN AVERMAET Greg's initial move but was countered by YATES, revealing Sky's rider hierarchy weakness.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: timed solo attack perfectly on steep finish, powerful enough to hold off elite chasers including YATES
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: strongest chaser response but launched counter slightly late, closed massive gap to only 3 seconds
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: took race lead on countback but couldn't follow YATES's acceleration, revealing climbing limitation
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: negative: crashed 30km out on decisive stage, eliminated from GC contention before final climb even started
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: finished third on mountainous finish days after winning Strade Bianche, showing unexpected climbing range
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: neutral: initiated move on final climb but immediately countered, strong but not climbing elite
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: neutral: tracked VAN AVERMAET's attack but faded when YATES countered, decent climbing but not decisive
